title: Infosys expands multi-year collaboration with GlobalFoundries for AI-led managed IT services
detailed_summary: Infosys announced an expanded multi-year collaboration with GlobalFoundries to provide AI-led managed services across GlobalFoundries' enterprise IT landscape. Infosys will manage end-to-end application, infrastructure, data and service desk operations for GlobalFoundries. The engagement is intended to move GlobalFoundries from externally supported operations to a managed services model driven by AI, automation and continuous optimization, with stated goals including reduced incidents, improved end-user experience and lower total cost of ownership over the long term. No contract value was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: GlobalFoundries selected Infosys based on its proven track record as an incumbent technology provider and its deep semiconductor domain expertise.
